alkylation reagent: alkylated (50 mM iodoacetamide, in the dark at room temperature for 1 h)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (50 mM iodoacetamide, in the dark at room temperature for 1 h)
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (sequencing grade, Promega, Madison, WI) at an enzyme/substrate ratio of 1:50
collision energy: with a NCE of 32 and dynamic exclusion of 30 s
enrichment method: using quantitative mass spectrometry analysis, we identified one protein as interacting with MEIOC: YTHDC2 (enrichment over MEIOC immunoprecipitation in Meioc-deficient testes > 1.5, unique peptides >1)
instrument: using a QExactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: Peptide labeling with TMT 6plex (Thermo Fisher Scientific) was performed per manufacturer’s instructions.
